	mov R7, #04h	;   4
	mov R6, #0Ch	;  12
	lcall jump_2B07
	mov R7, #04h	;   4
	mov R6, #0Dh	;  13
	lcall jump_2264
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_4352
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #0F0h	; 240  -16 'ð'
	mov R7, A
	mov A, R4
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_4352
	mov A, R7
	orl A, #01h	;   1
	mov R7, A
	mov A, R4
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_4352
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8095
	lcall jump_2507
	mov R7, #04h	;   4
	mov R6, #0Dh	;  13
	lcall jump_2B07
	mov R7, #0Ch	;  12
	mov R6, #09h	;   9
	lcall jump_2264
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_4352
	clr A
	mov R7, A
	mov A, R4
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507

	mov R7, A
	mov A, R4

	lcall jump_2507

	mov R6, #09h	;   9
	lcall jump_2264
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_4352
	mov A, R5

	mov R5, A

	anl A, #0F0h	; 240  -16 'ð'
	mov R4, A

	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0

	mov R5, A

	orl A, #01h	;   1
	mov R4, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507

	lcall jump_4352

	lcall jump_2507

	mov R6, #09h	;   9

	mov R6, #08h	;   8
	lcall jump_2264
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507

	mov A, R7

jump_3D67:
	mov R7, A
	mov A, R4
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_2507
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9EA0
	lcall jump_4352

	lcall jump_2507

	mov R6, #08h	;   8
	lcall jump_2B07
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E0E
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #jump_0001
	lcall jump_421F
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E1D
	movx @DPTR, A
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_3D99
	movx A, @DPTR
	cpl A
	jnz jump_3DBA
jump_3D99:
	mov C, 0A8h.7
	clr A
	rlc A
	mov 59h, A
	clr 0A8h.7
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0046
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	mov R5, A
	mov R7, #47h	;  71 'G'
	lcall jump_4CE2
	mov R5, #40h	;  64 '@'
	mov R7, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_3165
	mov A, 59h
	add A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov 0A8h.7, C
jump_3DBA:
	ret

	clr A
	mov R5, A
	mov R7, #45h	;  69 'E'
	lcall jump_4CE2
	mov DPTR, #dptr_04FC
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E1D
	movx @DPTR, A

	movx @DPTR, A

	inc A

	inc DPTR

	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR

	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E14
	movx @DPTR, A

	movx @DPTR, A

	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E13
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0050
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #0C0h	; 192  -64 'À'
	mov R5, A
	mov R7, #51h	;  81 'Q'
	ljmp jump_4CE2

	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E2D
	movx A, @DPTR
	xrl A, #01h	;   1
	jz jump_3E29
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E1B
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_3E29
	ajmp jump_3ED0

jump_3E29:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E0F
	movx A, @DPTR
	clr C
	subb A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	jnc jump_3E37
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
	sjmp jump_3E72

jump_3E37:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E10
	movx A, @DPTR
	clr C
	subb A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	jnc jump_3E46
	movx A, @DPTR

	clr A
	sjmp jump_3E6E

jump_3E46:

jump_3E72:

	movx A, @DPTR

	jz jump_3EF0
	movx A, @DPTR

	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E23

jump_3EB0:

	clr A

jump_3ED4:

	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9E27
	movx @DPTR, A

	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3EE9:

	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3EF0:

	nop
	xrl A, R2
	mov A, @R1

end
